# FLOSSK — Free/Libre Open Source Software Kosova

We support, promote, and develop free and open source software in Kosovo and the region. Based in Prishtina since 2009.

- Website: [flossk.org](https://flossk.org)
- Brand guidelines: [flossk/flossk-branding](https://github.com/flossk/flossk-branding)
